API Reference

Aries Platform API

Internal API endpoints for frontend integration, webhook proxying, and platform operations.

Base URL

https://aries.sugarandleather.com

All endpoints accept and return JSON. Authentication is handled via session cookies for app-shell routes. Marketing site endpoints (contact, demo, events) are public.

POST/api/contact

Submit a contact inquiry

Request Body

{ "user": { "name", "email", "company" }, "details": { "message" } }

Response

{ "status": "ok", "received": true }
POST/api/demo

Request a demo / get started

Request Body

{ "user": { "name", "email", "company", "teamSize" }, "details": { "useCase" } }

Response

{ "status": "ok", "tenant_id": "...", "state": "accepted" }
POST/api/sandbox/launch

Launch a sandbox environment

Request Body

{ "user": { "email" }, "details": { "useCase" } }

Response

{ "status": "ok", "tenant_id": "...", "tenant_type": "sandbox" }
POST/api/onboarding/start

Start tenant onboarding

Request Body

{ "tenant_id", "tenant_type", "signup_event_id" }

Response

{ "status": "ok", "tenant_id": "...", "state": "accepted|validated|duplicate" }
GET/api/onboarding/status/:tenantId

Check provisioning status

Request Body

—

Response

{ "status": "ok", "provisioning_status": "..." }
POST/api/marketing/jobs

Create a new marketing job

Request Body

{ "tenant_id", "topic", "platforms": [...], "tone", "audience" }

Response

{ "status": "accepted", "job_id": "..." }
GET/api/marketing/jobs/:jobId

Get job status and outputs

Request Body

—

Response

{ "status": "ok", "job": { ... } }
POST/api/publish/dispatch

Dispatch a publish event

Request Body

{ "tenant_id", "provider", "content", "media_urls" }

Response

{ "status": "ok", "dispatched_to": "n8n/publish-dispatch" }
GET/api/integrations

List all platform connections

Request Body

—

Response

{ "status": "ok", "cards": [...] }
POST/api/events

Track frontend events

Request Body

{ "intent": "cta_click", "page": "/", "meta": {} }

Response

{ "status": "ok", "tracked": true }
